root.rep_text: รายงาน การค้ำประกัน(รายตัว)

membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no between '016008' and '016008' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_coll_concern_nest_coll.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, (CASE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code WHEN '01' THEN PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) ELSE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description END)as collname , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no)) as member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as member_group_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract_coll
where ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_coll_concern_nest_concern.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_card where ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) /*WHERE*/
